metadata.name: Replicate — Train of Thought with replicate_count=2 draws 3 cards
metadata.description: Tests the Replicate mechanic (CR 702.56a) using Train of Thought ({1}{U} Sorcery, Replicate {1}{U}, draw a card). P1 casts Train of Thought paying the base cost {1}{U} plus the replicate additional cost {1}{U} twice (replicate_count=2), for a total of {3}{UUU}. After casting, the stack holds both the original spell and a ReplicateTrigger above it (stack count = 2). Both players pass priority — the ReplicateTrigger resolves first, creating 2 copies of Train of Thought on the stack. All 3 instances (2 copies + 1 original) should resolve in LIFO order, each drawing a card for p1, for a net gain of 3 cards. NOTE: Engine currently only draws 1 card (original resolves; copies do not execute their DrawCards effect) — see disputes.
metadata.generation_notes: Fixed 2026-03-05: Script corrected to use 4 priority_round actions (one per stack resolution). Initial single priority_round only resolved the trigger, leaving copies unresolved. Engine behavior is correct per CR 702.56a.

script.step_note: P1 casts Train of Thought with replicate_count=2, paying {3}{UUU}. ReplicateTrigger fires. 4 priority rounds drive: trigger resolution (creates 2 copies), then each copy resolves, then original resolves. CR 702.56a: 3 total DrawCards effects → p1 draws 3 cards.

actions.description: Initial: Train of Thought in p1 hand; p1 has {3}{UUU} in pool; stack empty; p1 library has 3 cards
actions.note: P1 has {3}{UUU} to pay: base cost {1}{U} + replicate cost {1}{U} x2. Library has Island/Forest/Plains for 3 draws.
CR 702.56a: p1 casts Train of Thought paying base {1}{U} + replicate {1}{U} x2 = {3}{UUU}. replicate_count=2 triggers ReplicateTrigger on stack.

actions.description: After cast: stack holds Train of Thought + ReplicateTrigger (count=2); p1 hand empty
actions.note: CR 702.56a: ReplicateTrigger placed on top (LIFO — resolves first). Stack = [Original, ReplicateTrigger].
CR 116.3: Both players pass. ReplicateTrigger (top of stack) resolves, creating 2 copies of Train of Thought. Stack = [Original, Copy1, Copy2]. Priority resets to p1.

resolution.note: CR 702.56a: Creates 2 copies (is_copy=true, not cast per ruling 2024-01-12).

actions.note: Informational: documents ReplicateTrigger resolution creating 2 copies on stack.

actions.description: After ReplicateTrigger resolves: stack has 3 objects (Original + 2 copies); hand still empty
actions.note: Stack = [Original (bottom), Copy1, Copy2 (top)]. Priority at p1.
CR 116.3: Both pass. Copy2 (top) resolves — p1 draws 1 card. Stack = [Original, Copy1].

resolution.note: CR 608.2: Copy 2 resolves; Controller draws 1 card.

actions.note: CR 116.3: Both pass. Copy1 (top) resolves — p1 draws 1 card. Stack = [Original].

resolution.note: CR 608.2: Copy 1 resolves; Controller draws 1 card.

actions.note: CR 116.3: Both pass. Original Train of Thought resolves — p1 draws 1 card. Spell moves to graveyard (CR 608.2n).

resolution.note: CR 608.2: Original resolves; Controller draws 1 card. Spell goes to graveyard.

actions.description: Final: p1 has drawn 3 cards total (2 copies + 1 original); stack empty; Train of Thought in graveyard
actions.note: CR 702.56a: replicate_count=2 → 2 copies + 1 original = 3 total DrawCards effects. p1 drew 3 cards (was 0 after casting, library had 3 cards).
